topicDefinition.oneLiner: Create viral content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and more. Optimized for social media success.
boundaries: Must support vertical (9:16) video formats natively.
Must include features aimed at social engagement (e.g., dynamic captions, hook generation, fast pacing).
Excludes slow-rendering cinematic models or complex desktop timeline editors not suited for quick social workflows.

howToChoose.title: Look for Native 9:16 and Auto-Reframing
howToChoose.desc: Ensure the tool doesn't just crop horizontally, but uses AI to actively track the speaker and keep them centered in a vertical frame.

howToChoose.title: Check Dynamic Caption Styles
howToChoose.desc: TikTok and Reels rely heavily on fast, animated captions (often called 'Hormozi style'). Make sure the platform includes these templates out of the box.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate Long-to-Short Workflows
howToChoose.desc: If you have podcasts or webinars, prioritize clipping tools like Opus Clip over from-scratch generators.

howToChoose.title: Assess Commercial Music Rights
howToChoose.desc: If you are running paid ads, verify that the AI tool's integrated music library is commercially cleared for social media platforms.

sources.title: 6 Best AI Video Tools for Social Media in 2026
sources.excerpt: A listicle focused on the best AI tools specifically for TikTok creators.

sections.heading: Top-Ranked Tools
sections.content: CapCut stands out as the most beginner-friendly option, combining AI video generation, automated captioning, and extensive effects in one platform. It's particularly popular for TikTok creators.

keyClaims: Combines AI video generation, automated captioning, and extensive effects
Popular for TikTok creators due to its simplicity and AI-powered auto-editing
pricingClaims: Offers free plans to test before upgrading
exportRules: Native vertical format export (9:16 aspect ratio)
proofSnippets: CapCut stands out as the most beginner-friendly option, combining AI video generation, automated captioning, and extensive effects in one platform.

notes: Official CapCut resource, highly relevant for social media.

sources.title: I Tested 7 AI Video Generators for TikTok
sources.excerpt: A deep dive testing AI generators based on viral hook generation and TikTok readiness.

sections.heading: Top-Ranked Tools
sections.content: Reelbase specializes in TikTok-first content with viral hook generation, direct TikTok publishing, and faceless video creation starting at $19/month.

sections.heading: Key Features to Look For
sections.content: Vertical format export (9:16 aspect ratio), Viral hook generation, Trending audio integration, Speed (under 5 minutes to finished video).

toolMentions.bestFor: Faceless TikTok videos with viral hooks
proofSnippets: Reelbase specializes in TikTok-first content with viral hook generation, direct TikTok publishing, and faceless video creation starting at $19/month.

notes: Good perspective on what actually makes a tool 'for social media' (hooks, trending audio).

sources.title: InVideo AI Official Pricing
sources.excerpt: Official details on InVideo AI pricing, limits, and export capabilities.

sections.heading: Free Plan Limits
sections.content: Free plan includes 2 video minutes and 1 AI credit per week, with 4 exports per week.

sections.heading: Export Watermark
sections.content: The free plan exports come with an InVideo watermark applied.

keyClaims: Generative AI video creation from text prompts
pricingClaims: Tiered paid plans (Plus, Max, and Generative)
watermarkRules: Free plan exports come with an InVideo watermark applied
exportRules: Free plan limited to 4 exports per week
refundRules: Refund policy available via help center request
limitations: Free plan strictly limited to 2 video minutes and 1 AI credit per week
proofSnippets: InVideo AI's free plan includes 2 video minutes and 1 AI credit per week, with 4 exports per week that include an InVideo watermark.

notes: Official InVideo constraints for social media creators.

sources.title: Top TikTok AI Video Generators of 2026

sections.heading: Top-Ranked Tools
sections.content: AI Studios (DeepBrain AI) ranks as the best overall for professional-grade creation, offering 2,000+ AI avatars, 150+ languages, and 7,000+ templates optimized for TikTok.

pricingClaims: Pricing ranges from free to $24/month for individual creators
proofSnippets: AI Studios (DeepBrain AI) ranks as the best overall for professional-grade creation, offering 2,000+ AI avatars, 150+ languages, and 7,000+ templates optimized for TikTok.
